reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Extension Education - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Almost non-existent placements, faculty are trained but no fests or competition, etc.

review_content.Placements: As the college is a government one, there aren't that many placements in the college. Some companies do come to the college but the package they provide is meagre. The placement cell of the college is well-established and maintained. We do have a WhatsApp group where information about companies is shared but the annual package they provide is not much.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel for master girls is pretty much okay. There is Wi-Fi in the hostel that barely ever works. The food is okayish too but the mess staff is the rudest to the brim. But the rooms and furniture are okay and feels for each semester is also quite low for a city like Indore.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of the infrastructure. The college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: The placement ratio of our college is so poor very few students get the good opportunity of placement but in the future. I think there are more chances of placement here because our college is working on it if we are talking about our course so I think I today time agriculture sector demanding good and brilliant students if our college works on it so I think this thing make revolution.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has all the facilities but if we are talking about the hostel there is a lot of struggle students are facing our college's actions are very slow towards the hostel facility hope. They are working on it in the future and if we are talking about infrastructure it's a little good not too much there are lots of good colleges in infrastructure.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good, and I suggest students take admission here.

review_content.Placements: Placements of the college are good. Many companies visit the college like Dupont India, Rallis India Limited, etc. The highest package is 65 LPA, and the average package is 25 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college is full of greenery. The area of the college is around 65 acres. The college has many birds like a peacock, etc. Our college provides both girl's and boys hostels on this campus.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members of the college are very good. They graduated from big colleges. They sacrifice their own life to build the life of the students. They work for students 24x7. The exam system is like a semester system.

reviews_list.review_title: Things I like about my college.

review_content.Placements: My college is not so placement-friendly but provides internships to students in the private and government sectors according to their interest and academic performance. We have a collaboration with IFFCO NABARD, in which students get a chance to perform, and several private companies are also invited to our college to give a chance to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college and hostel is really good, as I expected, because of well-furnished smart classes, cafeteria, gym, sports zone, and garden available for the students. The hostel facilities are also admirable because of the well-managed mess and the furniture provided to the students.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college studies are very good.

review_content.Placements: Every year, my college has a package of 20 to 30 students, and the average package of my college is Rs. 700,000 per year. Top-level companies visit my college and take students for placement. My course is agriculture, and we obtain information about agriculture and fulfill our dreams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in my college is very good, and there is Wi-Fi, rooms, and a library for studying. My hostel room is very good, but the hostel is a little small, so fewer students can stay. My college is very good for agriculture education, and the faculty is good, and the study is better.

review_content.Placements: The Rajmata Vijayaraje Scindia Krishi Vishwavidyalaya (RVSKVV) in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, has a placement cell to help students with campus interviews and other career opportunities. However, some students and alumni have reported that the college placement record is poor. Placement cell: The university has a placement cell that helps with campus interviews and other career opportunities. Placement record: Some students and alumni say that there are no campus placements and that companies are not interested in hiring students. Internships: Some students have reported getting internships from companies like Agrinext and Syngenta. Higher studies: Many students go on to pursue higher studies. Unemployment: Some students and alumni say that most students are unemployed.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Thinking before taking admission in the college.

content.Placements: There is no specific placement drive held on campus. In my three years, only 2 companies visited. One was hiring salespeople, and the other was hiring front office managers. If you think you can find a job at a college campus placement drive, then you are in the wrong place.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available on campus. If you live too far from the college, you have to arrange for a PG or rent a room on your own. Many courses are available in undergraduate and postgraduate programs, such as BCA, MBA, BBA, B.Sc., B.A., PGDCA, DCA, etc.
